heading: Wednesday Night
text: Slight chance of an early shower or sprinkle in the northern mountains, otherwise clearing, except gradual clearing northeast. Areas of valley fog late. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, some upper 50s in the Champlain Valley. West winds gusting to 25 mph early, then diminishing.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly sunny after any early fog. Highs in the mid to upper 70s, some lower 70s northeast and in the Adirondacks. West winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly clear. Areas of valley fog. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, mid 40s in northern cold hollows. Winds becoming light and variable.
